arts.ttl: Why Leeds United chief Daniel Farke left Daniel James out of his starting XI against Luton Town
arts.sum: Manager Daniel Farke has explained why he decided to leave Daniel James out of his starting line-up in Leeds United's convincing home win over Luton Town. "He needs space," stressed Farke, who confirmed Sam Byram was subbed off due to a hamstring complaint.

arts.ttl: Rob Edwards admits Luton Town 'couldn't get near' Leeds United and offers Elland Road verdict
arts.sum: Goals either side of half-time from Sam Byram, Joel Piroe and substitute Daniel James condemned the Hatters to a fifth consecutive away defeat. Describing the Whites as a "high-quality opponent", Edwards said the Hatters "couldn't get near them".

arts.ttl: Leeds ease past Luton to take Championship top spot again
arts.sum: Leeds regained top spot in the Championship after comfortably beating Luton 3-0 for their sixth straight home league win.
Highlights of the Sky Bet Championship match between Leeds United and Luton Town.

arts.ttl: Leeds United player ratings as Struijk and Byram impress in dominant Luton win
arts.sum: Joel Piroe added a crucial second on the stroke of half-time that killed the away team talk at the break. Took his goal well and there was one decent pass into Aaronson that caught the eye, but fairly quiet.

arts.ttl: Leeds lead the way after swatting aside Luton at Elland Road
arts.sum: Sam Byram, Joel Piroe and Daniel James all scored for the hosts.

arts.ttl: Leeds forward tipped to return to Elland Road after difficult loan spell
arts.sum: Sky Sports journalist Dan Bardell has backed Jack Harrison to return to Leeds United. Harrison is once again on loan at Everton this season after spending the 2023/24 campaign at Goodison Park. Pundit claims 24-year-old isn’t good enough to play for Leeds! arts.ttl: Leeds United team news vs Luton Town as Daniel Farke overlooks good form for rotation
arts.sum: Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community By joining the Leeds United community on WhatsApp, you'll see the biggest and best stories as soon as they happen.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke has double Leeds United suspension worry to consider tonight
arts.sum: Leeds United take on Luton Town tonight with Daniel Farke having two players in his current squad that are sitting on four yellow cards and one away from suspension. Leeds United: Joe Rodon and Willy Gnonto on suspension tightrope still

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard could do Leeds United a massive favour as he closes in on EFL agreement
arts.sum: Leeds United’s Championship rivals Coventry City are finally closing in on the appointment of Mark Robins’ replacement, with Frank Lampard in advanced talks this week. Coventry look to be finally nearing an appointment to replace Robins in the dugout this week, as The Telegraph report that they are in advanced talks with Frank Lampard over the vacancy.
